name: @radzor/qr-code
description: QR code generation and decoding. Produces PNG/SVG/terminal output from any string. Decodes QR codes from image buffers. Zero native dependencies.

inputs.name: errorCorrection
inputs.description: Error correction level. L=7%, M=15%, Q=25%, H=30% recovery capacity.

outputs.name: qrBuffer
outputs.description: Generated QR code as PNG or SVG bytes.

outputs.name: dataUrl
outputs.description: Base64 data URL for direct use in tags.

events.name: onGenerated
events.description: Fired when a QR code is generated.

events.name: onDecoded
events.description: Fired when a QR code is decoded from an image.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on generation or decode error.

actions.name: generate

params.name: data
params.description: String to encode (URL, text, JSON, etc.).

actions.description: Generate a QR code as PNG or SVG buffer.

actions.name: generateDataUrl
actions.description: Generate a QR code as a base64 data URL (PNG). Ready for use in .

actions.name: generateToFile

params.name: outputPath
params.description: File path to write (extension determines format: .png or .svg).

actions.description: Generate a QR code and write it to a file.

actions.name: decode

params.name: input
params.description: Image as Buffer or file path containing a QR code.

actions.description: Decode a QR code from an image and return the encoded string.

llm.constraints: Use error correction H when the QR code may be partially obscured (e.g. printed with a logo). Maximum data capacity varies by error correction level. For binary data, encode as base64 first.
